# Muhammad Qasim — Agentic AI Engineer

Karachi, Pakistan. I build autonomous AI systems that run 24/7 — MCP servers, multi-agent orchestration, SaaS automation, and production-grade agent workflows.

## About

Software developer based in Karachi, Pakistan. Working professional by day, agentic AI systems builder around the clock. Currently enrolled in GIAIC, where I've shipped 6 production-grade AI systems — autonomous agents, MCP servers, SaaS automation, and cloud-native orchestration — using Spec-Kit Plus (Spec-Driven Development). I don't explore technologies. I ship them.

## Shipped systems

- CRM Digital FTE — Autonomous agent handling support tickets across Gmail, WhatsApp, and Web — with cross-channel identity resolution.
  https://github.com/Psqasim/crm-digital-fte
- Personal AI Employee — 24/7 task execution with Claude Code + Obsidian. WhatsApp auto-reply, natural language commands, Odoo accounting integration.
  https://github.com/Psqasim/personal-ai-employee
- Physical AI Humanoid Textbook — Interactive AI Education Platform
  https://github.com/Psqasim/physical-ai-humanoid-textbook
- TaskFlow — 5-phase evolution from console app to Kubernetes-deployed system with event-driven architecture.
  https://github.com/Psqasim/hackathon-todo
- Factory-de-Odoo (Architecture Advisor) — Architecture reviewer for a 33,200+ line GSD orchestration framework generating full Odoo ERPs from a PRD.
  https://github.com/Inshal5Rauf1/Odoo-Development-Automation
- MCP-Native Developer Tool — Multi-MCP orchestration for automated PR reviews, test generation, and project scaffolding — extending Claude Code.
